note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Arterial Right lower extremity measures aprx 2.1 x 1.3cm, depth 0.5cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R heel 1.3x0.8, 0.2cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.1 cm x 1.3 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 45% slough, 55% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
